mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE (ID, BO_HAI_TONG_ID, BO_HAI_TONG_SHIP_ID, SCN, SHIP_ID, SHIP_NAME, IMP_EXP, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, IS_WATER, IS_SHORE_POWER, REQ_WATER, REQ_ELECTRICITY, BOW_DRAFT, STERN_DRAFT, IS_TUG, TUG_NUMBER, PILOTAGE, IS_PAYMENT, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, IS_DANGEROUS, ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN, ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME, LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME, BERTH_TIME, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, BERTH_TYPE, BOLLARD_NO_START, BOLLARD_NO_END, LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, RECEIVE_BY, RECEIVE_BY_NAME, RECEIVE_TIME, DEL_REMARK, DEL_BY, DEL_BY_NAME, DEL_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, START_PORT_ID, START_PORT_NAME, END_PORT_ID, END_PORT_NAME, PRE_PORT_ID, PRE_PORT_NAME, NEXT_PORT_ID, NEXT_PORT_NAME, SHIP_STATUS_CODE, SHIP_STATUS_NAME, CERTIFICATE_PATH, IS_START_WORK, IS_LAST_ARRIVAL_TYPE, BERTHING_CHARGE, JIESHOU_REMARK, WHARF, IS_CHECK) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{boHaiTongId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{boHaiTongShipId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{scn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impExp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loadUnload, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isWater, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isShorePower, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqWater, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqElectricity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bowDraft, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sternDraft, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isTug, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tugNumber, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pilotage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isPayment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{isDangerous, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arrivalTimePlan, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{leavePortTimePlan, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{arrivalAnchorageTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{leaveAnchorageTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{berthTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{berthId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{berthName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{berthType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bollardNoStart, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bollardNoEnd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leaveBerthTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{receiveBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{receiveByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiveTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{delByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{startPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{endPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prePortId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{prePortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nextPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{nextPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipStatusCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipStatusName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certificatePath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isStartWork, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isLastArrivalType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{berthingCharge, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jieShouRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wharf, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isCheck, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT INTO T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM (ID, BO_HAI_TONG_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, IMP_EXP, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, VOYAGE, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, CARGO_NUM, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, CONTACTS, SHIP_PHONE, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, SHIP_STATUS_CODE, SHIP_STATUS_NAME, WORK_START_TIME, WORK_END_TIME, PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME, PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO,FIR_CARGO_CATE,SEC_CARGO_CATE) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{boHaiTongId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{impExp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loadUnload, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCategoryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCategoryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contacts, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentAmount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{shipStatusCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipStatusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{workEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{preChangeShipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preChangeShipNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firCargoCate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secCargoCate, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT ID, TRUST_NO, TRUST_TYPE, CONTRACT_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PLAN_QUANTITY, PLAN_TON, REMARK, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIP_NAME, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, CHECK_TON, CHECK_NUMBER, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, RELEASE_BY, RELEASE_BY_NAME, RELEASE_TIME, CHECK_BY, CHECK_BY_NAME, CHECK_TIME, EXAMINE_BY, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_TIME, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, IMP_EXP FROM T_BUS_TRUST WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE
SHIP_ID = #{shipId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
SHIP_NAME = #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IMP_EXP = #{impExp, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LOAD_UNLOAD = #{loadUnload, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_WATER = #{isWater, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_SHORE_POWER = #{isShorePower, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REQ_WATER = #{reqWater, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REQ_ELECTRICITY = #{reqElectricity, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BOW_DRAFT = #{bowDraft, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STERN_DRAFT = #{sternDraft, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_TUG = #{isTug, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TUG_NUMBER = #{tugNumber, jdbcType=INTEGER},
PILOTAGE = #{pilotage, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_PAYMENT = #{isPayment, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PAYMENT_AMOUNT = #{paymentAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL},
IS_DANGEROUS = #{isDangerous, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN = #{arrivalTimePlan, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN = #{leavePortTimePlan, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME = #{arrivalAnchorageTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME = #{leaveAnchorageTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BERTH_TIME = #{berthTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BERTH_ID = #{berthId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
BERTH_NAME = #{berthName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BERTH_TYPE = #{berthType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BOLLARD_NO_START = #{bollardNoStart, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BOLLARD_NO_END = #{bollardNoEnd, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LEAVE_BERTH_TIME = #{leaveBerthTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RECEIVE_BY = #{receiveBy, jdbcType=BIGINT},
RECEIVE_BY_NAME = #{receiveByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RECEIVE_TIME = #{receiveTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DEL_REMARK = #{delRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEL_BY = #{delBy, jdbcType=BIGINT},
DEL_BY_NAME = #{delByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEL_TIME = #{delTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
START_PORT_ID = #{startPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
START_PORT_NAME = #{startPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
END_PORT_ID = #{endPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
END_PORT_NAME = #{endPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PRE_PORT_ID = #{prePortId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
PRE_PORT_NAME = #{prePortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
NEXT_PORT_ID = #{nextPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, NEXT_PORT_NAME = #{nextPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_START_WORK = #{isStartWork, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_LAST_ARRIVAL_TYPE = #{isLastArrivalType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BERTHING_CHARGE = #{berthingCharge, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JIESHOU_REMARK = #{jieShouRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WHARF = #{wharf , jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE
SHIP_ID = #{shipId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
SHIP_NAME = #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IMP_EXP = #{impExp, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LOAD_UNLOAD = #{loadUnload, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_WATER = #{isWater, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_SHORE_POWER = #{isShorePower, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REQ_WATER = #{reqWater, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REQ_ELECTRICITY = #{reqElectricity, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BOW_DRAFT = #{bowDraft, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STERN_DRAFT = #{sternDraft, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_TUG = #{isTug, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TUG_NUMBER = #{tugNumber, jdbcType=INTEGER},
PILOTAGE = #{pilotage, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_PAYMENT = #{isPayment, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PAYMENT_AMOUNT = #{paymentAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL},
IS_DANGEROUS = #{isDangerous, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN = #{arrivalTimePlan, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN = #{leavePortTimePlan, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME = #{arrivalAnchorageTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME = #{leaveAnchorageTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BERTH_TIME = #{berthTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BERTH_ID = #{berthId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
BERTH_NAME = #{berthName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BERTH_TYPE = #{berthType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BOLLARD_NO_START = #{bollardNoStart, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BOLLARD_NO_END = #{bollardNoEnd, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LEAVE_BERTH_TIME = #{leaveBerthTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RECEIVE_BY = #{receiveBy, jdbcType=BIGINT},
RECEIVE_BY_NAME = #{receiveByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RECEIVE_TIME = #{receiveTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DEL_REMARK = #{delRemark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEL_BY = #{delBy, jdbcType=BIGINT},
DEL_BY_NAME = #{delByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DEL_TIME = #{delTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
START_PORT_ID = #{startPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
START_PORT_NAME = #{startPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
END_PORT_ID = #{endPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
END_PORT_NAME = #{endPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PRE_PORT_ID = #{prePortId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
PRE_PORT_NAME = #{prePortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
NEXT_PORT_ID = #{nextPortId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
NEXT_PORT_NAME = #{nextPortName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BO_HAI_TONG_SHIP_ID = #{boHaiTongShipId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WHARF = #{wharf , jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WHERE BO_HAI_TONG_ID = #{boHaiTongId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, BO_HAI_TONG_ID, BO_HAI_TONG_SHIP_ID, SCN, SHIP_ID, SHIP_NAME, IMP_EXP, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, IS_WATER, IS_SHORE_POWER, REQ_WATER, REQ_ELECTRICITY, BOW_DRAFT, STERN_DRAFT, IS_TUG, TUG_NUMBER, PILOTAGE, IS_PAYMENT, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, IS_DANGEROUS, ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN, ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME, LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME, BERTH_TIME, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, BERTH_TYPE, BOLLARD_NO_START, BOLLARD_NO_END, LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, RECEIVE_BY, RECEIVE_BY_NAME, RECEIVE_TIME, DEL_FLAG, DEL_REMARK, DEL_BY, DEL_BY_NAME, DEL_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, START_PORT_ID, START_PORT_NAME, END_PORT_ID, END_PORT_NAME, PRE_PORT_ID, PRE_PORT_NAME, NEXT_PORT_ID, NEXT_PORT_NAME, SHIP_STATUS_CODE, SHIP_STATUS_NAME, IS_LAST_ARRIVAL_TYPE, IS_START_WORK FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TDS.ID, TDS.BO_HAI_TONG_ID, TDS.BO_HAI_TONG_SHIP_ID, TDS.SCN, TDS.SHIP_ID, TDS.SHIP_NAME, TDS.IMP_EXP, TDS.TRADE_TYPE, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDS.IS_WATER, TDS.IS_SHORE_POWER, TDS.REQ_WATER, TDS.REQ_ELECTRICITY, TDS.BOW_DRAFT, TDS.STERN_DRAFT, TDS.IS_TUG, TDS.TUG_NUMBER, TDS.PILOTAGE, TDS.IS_PAYMENT, TDS.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDS.IS_DANGEROUS, TDS.ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, TDS.LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN, TDS.ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME, TDS.LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME, TDS.BERTH_TIME, TDS.BERTH_ID, TDS.BERTH_NAME, TDS.BERTH_TYPE, TDS.BOLLARD_NO_START, TDS.BOLLARD_NO_END, TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, TDS.RECEIVE_BY, TDS.RECEIVE_BY_NAME, TDS.RECEIVE_TIME, TDS.DEL_FLAG, TDS.DEL_REMARK, TDS.DEL_BY, TDS.DEL_BY_NAME, TDS.DEL_TIME, TDS.REMARK, TDS.CREATE_BY, TDS.CREATE_BY_NAME, TDS.CREATE_TIME, TDS.UPDATE_BY, TDS.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDS.UPDATE_TIME, TDS.START_PORT_ID, TDS.START_PORT_NAME, TDS.END_PORT_ID, TDS.END_PORT_NAME, TDS.PRE_PORT_ID, TDS.PRE_PORT_NAME, TDS.NEXT_PORT_ID, TDS.NEXT_PORT_NAME, TDS.SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDS.SHIP_STATUS_NAME, TDS.IS_LAST_ARRIVAL_TYPE, TDS.IS_START_WORK FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID WHERE TDSI.ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, SCN, SHIP_ID, SHIP_NAME, IMP_EXP, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, IS_WATER, IS_SHORE_POWER, REQ_WATER, REQ_ELECTRICITY, BOW_DRAFT, STERN_DRAFT, IS_TUG, TUG_NUMBER, PILOTAGE, IS_PAYMENT, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, IS_DANGEROUS, ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN, ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME, LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME, BERTH_TIME, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, BERTH_TYPE, BOLLARD_NO_START, BOLLARD_NO_END, LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, RECEIVE_BY, RECEIVE_BY_NAME, RECEIVE_TIME, DEL_FLAG, DEL_REMARK, DEL_BY, DEL_BY_NAME, DEL_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, START_PORT_ID, START_PORT_NAME, END_PORT_ID, END_PORT_NAME, PRE_PORT_ID, PRE_PORT_NAME, NEXT_PORT_ID, NEXT_PORT_NAME, SHIP_STATUS_CODE, SHIP_STATUS_NAME FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE WHERE BO_HAI_TONG_ID = #{boHaiTongId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT tds.ship_name "shipName", LISTAGG(tdsi.voyage, '/') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY tdsi.voyage) AS "voyage" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM tdsi LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE tds ON tdsi.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = tds.ID WHERE tds.id = #{shipVoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY tds.ship_name ORDER BY tds.ship_name
SELECT T1.ADVANCE_PAYMENT FROM M_SHIP_PREPAY_STD T1 WHERE TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType} AND #{dwt} > T1.DWT_START and #{dwt} <= T1.DWT_END

SELECT ID, SCN, SHIP_ID, SHIP_NAME, IMP_EXP, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, IS_WATER, IS_SHORE_POWER, REQ_WATER, REQ_ELECTRICITY, BOW_DRAFT, STERN_DRAFT, IS_TUG, TUG_NUMBER, PILOTAGE, IS_PAYMENT, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, IS_DANGEROUS, ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN, ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME, LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME, BERTH_TIME, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, BERTH_TYPE, BOLLARD_NO_START, BOLLARD_NO_END, LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, RECEIVE_BY, RECEIVE_BY_NAME, RECEIVE_TIME, DEL_FLAG, DEL_REMARK, DEL_BY, DEL_BY_NAME, DEL_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, START_PORT_ID, START_PORT_NAME, END_PORT_ID, END_PORT_NAME, PRE_PORT_ID, PRE_PORT_NAME, NEXT_PORT_ID, NEXT_PORT_NAME, SHIP_STATUS_CODE, SHIP_STATUS_NAME, IS_LAST_ARRIVAL_TYPE FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE WHERE SHIP_ID = #{shipId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SHIP_STATUS_CODE IN ('50', '60', '70', '80', '90', '100', '110', '120') ORDER BY BERTH_TIME DESC
SELECT A.ID, A.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, A.PAYMENT_AMOUNT FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM A LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE B ON A.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = B.ID WHERE B.SHIP_STATUS_CODE != '00' AND CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}

select SUM(t1.PAYMENT_AMOUNT) PAYMENT_SUM from T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE t LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM t1 ON t.ID = t1.SHIPVOYAGE_ID where t.DEL_FLAG = 0 and t.IS_PAYMENT = 1 and t1.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE SET DEL_FLAG = '1', DEL_REMARK = #{delRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEL_BY = #{base.loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, DEL_BY_NAME = #{base.loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEL_TIME = #{base.now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, SHIP_STATUS_CODE = '00', SHIP_STATUS_NAME = '作废' WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE SET REJECTION_REMARK = #{rejectionRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REJECTION_BY = #{base.loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REJECTION_BY_NAME = #{base.loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REJECTION_TIME = #{base.now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, SHIP_STATUS_CODE = '11', SHIP_STATUS_NAME = '拒收' WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE SET RECEIVE_BY = #{base.loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, RECEIVE_BY_NAME = #{base.loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RECEIVE_TIME = #{base.now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, SHIP_STATUS_CODE = '20', SHIP_STATUS_NAME = '接收' WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM SET SHIP_STATUS_CODE = '20', SHIP_STATUS_NAME = '接收' WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM
SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IMP_EXP = #{impExp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LOAD_UNLOAD = #{loadUnload,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
VOYAGE = #{voyage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = #{cargoCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME = #{cargoCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_NUM = #{cargoNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONTACTS = #{contacts,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_PHONE = #{shipPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PAYMENT_AMOUNT = #{paymentAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_STATUS_CODE = #{shipStatusCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_STATUS_NAME = #{shipStatusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WORK_START_TIME = #{workStartTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WORK_END_TIME = #{workEndTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BO_HAI_TONG_ID = #{boHaiTongId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME = #{preChangeShipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO = #{preChangeShipNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FIR_CARGO_CATE = #{firCargoCate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SEC_CARGO_CATE = #{secCargoCate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
UPDATE M_SJSB_LOG SET SJSB_STATUS = #{status} WHERE SERVICE_ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.ID "value",A.SHIP_NAME || '_' || B.VOYAGE "label" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE A LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM WHERE IMP_EXP = 'IN') B ON A.ID = B.SHIPVOYAGE_ID WHERE A.SHIP_STATUS_CODE IN ('30','40','50','60','70','80','90','100','110') AND A.IMP_EXP = 'IN'
AND A.ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss'), 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss')
AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss'), 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss') >= A.ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME
UNION ALL SELECT A.ID "value",A.SHIP_NAME || '_' || B.VOYAGE "label" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE A LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM WHERE IMP_EXP = 'OUT') B ON A.ID = B.SHIPVOYAGE_ID WHERE A.SHIP_STATUS_CODE IN ('30','40','50','60','70','80','90','100','110') AND A.IMP_EXP = 'OUT'
UNION ALL SELECT A.ID "value",(A.SHIP_NAME || '_' || B.VOYAGE || '/' || C.VOYAGE) "label" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE A LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM WHERE IMP_EXP = 'OUT') B ON A.ID = B.SHIPVOYAGE_ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM WHERE IMP_EXP = 'OUT') C ON A.ID = C.SHIPVOYAGE_ID WHERE A.SHIP_STATUS_CODE IN ('30','40','50','60','70','80','90','100','110') AND A.IMP_EXP = 'INOUT'

SELECT '预到' "name", COUNT(0) "value" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE WHERE SHIP_STATUS_CODE IN ('20') and to_char(ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN,'yyyy-mm-dd') >= #{time,jdbcType=VARCHAR} union all SELECT '锚地' "name", COUNT(0) "value" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE WHERE SHIP_STATUS_CODE IN ('30', '40', '110') union all SELECT '在港' "name", COUNT(0) "value" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE WHERE SHIP_STATUS_CODE IN ('50', '60', '70', '80', '90', '100')

SELECT * FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC A LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE B ON A.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = B.ID WHERE B.SHIP_STATUS_CODE = '120' AND B.LEAVE_PORT_TIME >= #{startTime} AND #{endTime} >= B.LEAVE_PORT_TIME
AND (B.JKHWNAME LIKE #{cargoNameLike} OR B.CKHWNAME LIKE #{cargoNameLike})

SELECT A.START_TIME "startTime", A.END_TIME "endTime", A.CABIN_NO "cabinNo", A.WORK_LOAD "workLoad", A.EQUIPMENT_ID "equipmentId", A.SHIP_VOYAGE_ID "shipVoyageId" FROM T_PRD_DOOR_RECORD A LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE B ON A.SHIP_VOYAGE_ID = B.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM C ON C.ID = A.SHIP_VOYAGE_ITEM_ID WHERE B.SHIP_STATUS_CODE = '120' AND B.LEAVE_PORT_TIME >= #{startTime} AND #{endTime} >= B.LEAVE_PORT_TIME
AND C.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME LIKE #{cargoNameLike}

SELECT ITEM.ID "shipVoyageItemId", SHIPVOYAGE.SHIP_NAME || '_' || ITEM.VOYAGE "shipVoyage", SHIPVOYAGE.SCN "scn", SHIPVOYAGE.TRADE_TYPE "tradeType", ITEM.LOAD_UNLOAD || '船' "loadUnload", SHIPVOYAGE.ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME "arrivalAnchorageTime", SHIPVOYAGE.BERTH_TIME "berthTime", SHIPVOYAGE.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME "lbsj", NVL(SHIP.HATCH_NUM,'0') "hatchNum", ROUND(TO_NUMBER((TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SHIPVOYAGE.WGSJ,1,19),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') - TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SHIPVOYAGE.KGSJ,1,19),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'))*24),2) "sumTime" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM ITEM INNER JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE SHIPVOYAGE ON ITEM.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = SHIPVOYAGE.ID LEFT JOIN M_SHIP SHIP ON SHIP.ID = SHIPVOYAGE.SHIP_ID
ITEM.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId}

SELECT '电耗' "name" ,NVL(ROUND( SUM( NVL( orgName, 0 ) ), 2 ),0) "value" FROM "V_ELC"
TO_DATE(RQ, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= to_date( #{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) AND to_date(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= TO_DATE(RQ, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
UNION SELECT '油耗' "name" , NVL(ROUND( SUM( NVL( JE, 0 ) ), 2 ),0) "value" FROM "V_OIL"
RQ >= to_date( #{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) AND to_date(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= RQ

SELECT CASE WHEN TYPE = '6' THEN '电耗(件)' WHEN TYPE = '7' THEN '电耗(散)' WHEN TYPE = '8' THEN '油耗(件)' WHEN TYPE = '9' THEN '油耗(散)' WHEN TYPE = '4' THEN '生产物资' WHEN TYPE = '5' THEN '外付成本' END "name", NVL( SUM( VALUE ), 0 ) "value" FROM T_STD_ENERGY WHERE TYPE IN ('6', '7','8', '9', '4', '5') AND MONTH >= #{startTime} AND MONTH <= #{endTime} GROUP BY TYPE

select sum(TPWTD.TON) "ton", case when TPWP.PLAN_TYPE = '4' then MC.PACKING_NAME else tmp_tbtc.PACKING_NAME end "package" from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD left join T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT on TPWT.id = TPWTD.WORK_TICKET_ID left join T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP on TPWP.id = TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID left join (select MC2.cargo_code,to_char(decode(MC2.WORK_TYPE,'1','件','2','散','散')) PACKING_NAME from M_CARGO MC2 ) MC on TPWP.CARGO_CODE = MC.CARGO_CODE left join (select to_char(max(TBCI.PACKING_NAME)) PACKING_NAME,TBT.ID from T_BUS_TRUST TBT left join T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC on TBT.id = TBTC.TRUST_ID left join T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI on TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID group by TBT.ID) tmp_tbtc on tmp_tbtc.ID = TPWP.TRUST_ID where((TPWP.PLAN_TYPE = '4' and ALLOT_TYPE in('2','3')) or (ALLOT_TYPE = '1')) and TPWP.DEPT_NAME !='固机队' and TPWP.WORK_DATE >= #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} and TPWP.WORK_DATE <=#{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
group by case when TPWP.PLAN_TYPE = '4' then MC.PACKING_NAME else tmp_tbtc.PACKING_NAME end

SELECT TDS.BERTH_NAME "berthName", TDS.TRADE_TYPE "tradeType", TDS.IMP_EXP "impExp", MS.SHIP_NAME "shipName", MS.SHIP_NAME_EN "shipNameEn", TDSI.VOYAGE "voyage", ROUND(TO_NUMBER(TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME - TDS.BERTH_TIME) * 24) "停泊时长", TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE "shipVoyage", TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD "loadUnload", TDS.BERTH_TIME "berthTime", TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME "leaveBerthTime" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM tdsi LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE tds ON tds.ID = tdsi.SHIPVOYAGE_ID LEFT JOIN M_SHIP ms ON MS.ID = TDS.SHIP_ID WHERE tdsi.ID = #{shipVoyageItemId}
SELECT DICT_TYPE as "firText", DICT_LABEL as "label" , DICT_VALUE as "value" FROM M_DICT_DATA WHERE DICT_TYPE IN (SELECT DICT_VALUE FROM M_DICT_DATA WHERE DICT_TYPE = 'level_one')
